name: IRSF-002.2: Seizure & Mortality Incidence — Mild MECP2 (R294X/R133C)
description: Incidence rate analysis for seizure onset and all-cause mortality in the Mild MECP2 (R294X/R133C) genotype subgroup (cohort 199). Outcomes: first seizure onset (CSS Epilepsy subscale > 0, cohort 210) and all-cause mortality (cohort 211). Age-stratified with pediatric bins (0-4, 5-9, 10-17, 18+). Gender-stratified to detect sex-linked differences (relevant for MECP2 duplication which affects males).
